meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-06-13 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: Short night (6h04, score 77) following a strong 8h12 (score 89) on Friday. Every autonomic marker is at week-best: RHR 52 (week-low), HRV 45 (week-high, +7 vs baseline), stress 14 (calmest of the week). Deep sleep was excellent (1h52). Today is trap-bar deadlift day and readiness supports it (computed 76) — the only limiter is fuel, not physiology, so don't train fasted on 6h sleep.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Kratka noć (6h04, ocjena 77) nakon snažnih 8h12 (ocjena 89) u petak. Svi autonomni pokazatelji su na tjednom maksimumu: RHR 52 (najniži u tjednu), HRV 45 (najviši, +7 vs prosjek), stres 14 (najmirniji u tjednu). Duboki san bio je odličan (1h52). Danas je trap-bar mrtvo dizanje i spremnost to podržava (izračun 76) — jedino ograničenje je gorivo, ne fiziologija, pa ne treniraj natašte na 6h sna.
